info.title: Retail Optical Clinic Management System API
info.description: REST API for managing patients, branches, roles, and authentication in an optical clinic management system. Supports JWT-based authentication with role-based access control (ADMIN, CASHIER, OPTOMETRIST).

tags.name: Patients
tags.description: Patient CRUD with soft-delete/restore and duplicate detection

get.description: Returns server status, environment, and uptime.

message.example: Retail Optical Clinic Management API is running

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password. Returns JWT token. Tracks login attempts with IP and User-Agent. Account locks after 5 failed attempts in 15 minutes.

423.description: Account locked due to multiple failed login attempts

post.description: Logout current user. JWT is discarded client-side.

get.description: List patients with pagination, searching, and filtering. Soft-deleted patients excluded by default.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by fullName, patientCode, or phone number

post.description: Register a new patient. Detects duplicates by name, DOB, primary phone, and branch. ADMIN only.

get.description: Retrieve single patient details by ID.

patch.description: Update active patient information. All fields optional. ADMIN, CASHIER, or OPTOMETRIST.

delete.description: Soft delete a patient (marks as deleted, preserves data). Records who deleted and reason. ADMIN only.

post.description: Restore a soft-deleted patient. Validates no active duplicate exists. ADMIN or CASHIER.

get.description: List branches with pagination and search. ADMIN or CASHIER.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, code, or address

post.description: Create a new clinic branch. ADMIN only.

get.description: Retrieve branch details with patient statistics. ADMIN or CASHIER.

patch.description: Update branch information. At least one field required. ADMIN or CASHIER.

delete.description: Delete branch. Only if no linked patients. ADMIN only.

409.description: Cannot delete branch with linked patients

get.description: List all roles with pagination and search. ADMIN only.

post.description: Create a new role. System roles (ADMIN, CASHIER) cannot be created. ADMIN only.

patch.description: Update role name. System roles (ADMIN, CASHIER) cannot be renamed. ADMIN only.

400.description: System role cannot be renamed / Validation error

delete.description: Delete role. System roles cannot be deleted. Role must have no assigned users. ADMIN only.

409.description: Cannot delete role assigned to users

duplicateOverride.description: Set true to bypass duplicate check

UpdateBranchRequest.description: At least one field is required.

name.description: Must start with a letter. Only A-Z, 0-9, underscore. Auto-uppercased.
